name: West Pharmaceutical

screener.note: Valuation score 5.13 exceeds 0.8 limit (Upgraded from FAIL: Protected by elite quality floor (QCS 9)) (REJECT: Stalled at WAIT with base CAGR 9% < 15%)

bullCase: West Pharmaceutical is the near-monopoly supplier of drug containment components (stoppers, seals, closures) for injectable pharmaceuticals. Every pre-filled syringe and vial of injectable drug uses West components — this embedded position provides pricing power and secular volume growth from biologics and GLP-1 manufacturing ramp.
bearCase: The pandemic-era demand surge (COVID vaccines required 2x normal closure volume) created a massive revenue pull-forward. The post-COVID inventory destocking cycle has been severe, with volumes declining 15-20% from peak. Recovery timeline remains uncertain.
